General.Name: Vpower Group International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: VPower Group International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, integrates, sells, and installs engine-based electricity generation units in Hong Kong, Mainland China, other Asian countries, Latin America, and internationally. It operates in two segments, System Integration (SI); and Investment, Building and Operating (IBO). The company designs, invests in, builds, and operates distributed power generation (DPG) stations to provide distributed power solutions. It also engages in trading of engines and components; manufacturing, sale, and installation of power generation systems; and provision of technical services. VPower Group International Holdings Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Hung Hom, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Office Tower 1, Hung Hom, Hong Kong
